title: tylophora obtusula
intro: Tylophora obtusula is a species of flowering plant in the family Asclepiadaceae, commonly known as a type of milkweed. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as asthma and bronchitis, due to its anti-inflammatory and bronchodilatory effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving cough and cold symptoms, and acting as an expectorant to promote mucus discharge. Tylophora obtusula can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal treatment.
